title: Union councils of Pakistan

"List of constituencies of Pakistan")**: [Punjab](/wiki/Provincial_Assembly_of_the_Punjab "Provincial Assembly of the Punjab")   + [Sindh](/wiki/Provincial_Assembly_of_Sindh "Provincial Assembly of Balochistan")   + [Gilgi-Baltistan](/wiki/Gilgit-Baltistan_Assembly "Gilgit-Baltistan Assembly")  ---   **[Azad Kashmir government](/wiki/Government_of_Azad_Kashmir "Government of Azad Kashmir")**   * [President](/wiki/President_of_Azad_Kashmir "President of Azad Kashmir"): [Sultan Mehmood Chaudhry](/wiki/Sultan_Mehmood_Chaudhry "Sultan Mehmood Chaudhry") * [Prime Minister](/wiki/Prime_Minister_of_Azad_Kashmir "Prime Minister of Azad Kashmir"): [Faisal Mumtaz Rathore](/wiki/Faisal_Mumtaz_Rathore "Faisal Mumtaz Rathore") * [Legislative * [Chairman](/wiki/Chairman_of_the_Senate_of_Pakistan "Chairman of the Senate of Pakistan"): [Yousaf Raza Gillani](/wiki/Yousaf_Raza_Gillani "Yousaf Raza Gillani") * [Deputy Chairman](/wiki/Deputy_Chairman_of_the_Senate_of_Pakistan "Deputy Chairman of the Senate of Pakistan"): [Syedaal Khan Nasar](/wiki/Syedaal_Khan_Nasar "Syedaal Khan Nasar") ([PML(N)](/wiki/Pakistan_Muslim_League_(N) "Pakistan Muslim League (N)")) * [Leader of the House](/wiki/Leader_of_the_House_of_Federation_(Pakistan) "Leader of the House of Federation (Pakistan)"): [Ishaq Dar](/wiki/Ishaq_Dar "Ishaq Dar") ([PML(N)](/wiki/Pakistan_Muslim_League_(N) "Pakistan Muslim League (N)")) * [Opposition leader](/wiki/Leader_of_the_Opposition "Leader of the Opposition"): Vacant  ---  * **[National Assembly (Lower House)](/wiki/National_Assembly_(Pakistan) "National Assembly (Pakistan)")**    * [Leader of the House](/wiki/Prime_Minister_of_Pakistan "Prime Minister of Pakistan"): [Shehbaz Sharif](/wiki/Shehbaz_Sharif "Shehbaz Sharif") ([PML(N)](/wiki/Pakistan_Muslim_League_(N) "Pakistan Muslim League (N)")) * [Speaker](/wiki/Speaker_of_the_National_Assembly_of_Pakistan "Speaker of the National Assembly of Pakistan"): [Ayaz Sadiq](/wiki/Ayaz_Sadiq "Ayaz Sadiq") ([PML(N)](/wiki/Pakistan_Muslim_League_(N) "Pakistan Muslim League (N)")) * Deputy speaker: [Syed Ghulam Mustafa Shah](/wiki/Syed_Ghulam_Mustafa_Shah_(Pakistani_politician) "Syed Ghulam Mustafa Shah (Pakistani politician)") ([PPP](/wiki/Pakistan_People%27s_Party "Pakistan People's Party")) * [Leader of the Opposition](/wiki/Leader_of_the_Opposition_(Pakistan) "Leader of the Opposition (Pakistan)"): Vacant  --- rights](/wiki/Human_rights_in_Pakistan "Human rights in Pakistan") |

[Asif Ali Zardari](/wiki/Asif_Ali_Zardari "Asif Ali Zardari") ([PPP](/wiki/Pakistan_People%27s_Party "Pakistan People's Party")) * [List of presidents of Pakistan](/wiki/List_of_presidents_of_Pakistan "List of presidents of Pakistan")  ---  * **[Prime Minister of Pakistan](/wiki/Prime_Minister_of_Pakistan "Prime Minister of Pakistan")**: [Shahbaz Sharif](/wiki/Shahbaz_Sharif "Shahbaz Sharif") ([PML-N](/wiki/Pakistan_Muslim_League_(N) "Pakistan Muslim League (N)")) * [List of prime ministers of Pakistan](/wiki/List_of_prime_ministers_of_Pakistan "List of prime ministers of Pakistan")  ---   * [Cabinet of Pakistan](/wiki/Cabinet_of_Pakistan "Cabinet of Pakistan") * [Cabinet Secretary](/wiki/Cabinet_Secretary_(Pakistan) "Cabinet Secretary (Pakistan)") |

infobox.key: [Supreme Court of Pakistan](/wiki/Supreme_Court_of_Pakistan "Supreme Court of Pakistan")
infobox.value: * [Chief Justice](/wiki/Chief_Justice_of_Pakistan "Chief Justice of Pakistan"): [Yahya Afridi](/wiki/Yahya_Afridi "Yahya Afridi") * [List of justices](/wiki/List_of_justices_of_the_Supreme_Court_of_Pakistan "List of justices of the Supreme Court of Pakistan") * Judges appointment body: [Supreme Judicial Council](/wiki/Supreme_Judicial_Council_of_Pakistan "Supreme Judicial Council of Pakistan") and [Judicial Commission](/wiki/Judicial_Commission_of_Pakistan "Judicial Commission of Pakistan")  ---  * **[High courts](/wiki/High_courts_of_Pakistan "High courts of Pakistan")**: [Islamabad](/wiki/Islamabad_High_Court "Islamabad High Court"), [Punjab](/wiki/Lahore_High_Court "Lahore High Court"), [Sindh](/wiki/Sindh_High_Court "Sindh High Court"), [KPK](/wiki/Peshawar_High_Court "Peshawar High Court"), [Balochistan](/wiki/Balochistan_High_Court "Balochistan High Court"), [Shariat Court](/wiki/Federal_Shariat_Court "Federal Shariat Court")  ---  * **Territorial courts**: [AJK supreme court](/wiki/Supreme_Court_of_Azad_Jammu_and_Kashmir "Supreme Court of Azad Jammu and Kashmir"), [AJK High court](/wiki/High_Court_of_Azad_Jammu_and_Kashmir "High Court of Azad Jammu and Kashmir"), [Gilgit-Baltistan supreme court](/wiki/Supreme_Appellate_Court_Gilgit-Baltistan "Supreme Appellate Court Gilgit-Baltistan"), [Gilgit-Baltistan High Court](/wiki/Gilgit-Baltistan_Chief_Court "Gilgit-Baltistan Chief Court")  ---  * **Special courts**: [Anti Terrorism Courts](/wiki/Anti_Terrorism_Court_of_Pakistan "Anti Terrorism Court of Pakistan"), [Accountability Courts](/wiki/National_Accountability_Bureau "National Accountability Bureau")  ---  * + [District Courts](/wiki/District_courts_of_Pakistan "District courts of Pakistan") |

The **union councils of Pakistan** ([Urdu](/wiki/Urdu_language "Urdu language"): یونین کونسل), referred to as lowest tier of [local government](/wiki/Local_government_in_Pakistan "Local government in Pakistan") bodies, and headed by a [Chairperson](/wiki/Chairperson "Chairperson"), plus a vice chairperson. Union Councils in Pakistan are established under the respective Local Government Acts of all provinces and federal units. Pakistan is a federal country where local government is the third level of government after federal provincial governments.

They form the second-tier of [local government](/wiki/Local_government_in_Pakistan "Local government in Pakistan") and last [tier](/wiki/Administrative_divisions_of_Pakistan "Administrative divisions of Pakistan") overall in Pakistan's administrative structure. The structure and responsibilities of union councils differ across provinces and territories of the country.

As of 2007, there were 5,375 rural union councils across 115 districts.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Administration

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Union_councils_of_Pakistan&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Administration")]

Union councils are the primary governmental institution in Pakistan. They are often known as "local councils" in urban and rural areas. In rural areas union councils are formed by combining some of the surrounding villages and in urban areas they consist of some urban neighborhoods.

Headed by a Union Chairperson, each union council has some elected members or councillors. In addition to four male and two female members elected directly, there are two male and two female representatives of the labour, a minority member, a Union Chairperson, and his deputy, known as Union vice chairperson. Besides elected members, there are several government employees and functionaries in every union council, who report to the secretary of the union council. The latter is a civil servant appointed by the state. The addition of seats for minority members and special interests was implemented in part due to people not wanting to run for election when the union council system was first implemented.[[2]](#cite_note-:0-2)

Union councils perform numerous functions including levying taxes,[[2]](#cite_note-:0-2) building infrastructure,[[3]](#cite_note-3) and acting as an alternative dispute resolution system.[[4]](#cite_note-4)

### Structure

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Union_councils_of_Pakistan&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Structure")]

Shown below is a simplified structure of the political hierarchy, the federal government governs the provinces (allocation of resources and policy decisions), the provinces govern the districts etc, the union councils are involved directly in local government administration.

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
|
|  | |  | | Federal government | | | | | |
|
|  | |  | |  | |  |  |  | |  | |  | |  | |  | |
|
|  | |  | | Province | | | | | |
|
|  | |  | |  | |  |  |  | |  | |  | |  | |  | |
|
|  | |  | | [District](/wiki/Districts_of_Pakistan "Districts of Pakistan") | | | | | |
|
|  | |  | |  | |  |  |  | |  | |  | |  | |  | |
|
|  | |  | | [Tehsil](/wiki/Tehsils_of_Pakistan "Tehsils of Pakistan") | | | | | |
|
|  | |  | |  | |  |  |  | |  | |  | |  | |  | |
|
|  | |  | | Union Council | | | | | |
|
|  | |
|
